    "The transportation sector is the single largest contributor to greenhouse gas emissions in California.",

    "Decades of inequitable transportation policies have burdened communities of color and low-income communities with worse health and economic outcomes.",
    "Transportation investments have the potential to yield more economic opportunities by creating high-quality jobs, increasing options to get people to work, and improving local economic activity.",
